'''鈭歾h-r-zh''' ('''kazharazh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wuff|wuff]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-r-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wuff|wuff]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾h-r-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kazharazh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizharazh|thizharazh]] || [[word:jizharazh|jizharazh]] || [[word:shizharazh|shizharazh]] || [[word:kizharazh|kizharazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzharazh|thuthuzharazh]] || [[word:jujuzharazh|jujuzharazh]] || [[word:shushuzharazh|shushuzharazh]] || [[word:kukuzharazh|kukuzharazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzharazh|thuzharazh]] || [[word:juzharazh|juzharazh]] || [[word:shuzharazh|shuzharazh]] || [[word:kuzharazh|kuzharazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzharazh|thuzharazh]] || [[word:juzharazh|juzharazh]] || [[word:shuzharazh|shuzharazh]] || [[word:kuzharazh|kuzharazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezharazh|thezharazh]] || [[word:jezharazh|jezharazh]] || [[word:shezharazh|shezharazh]] || [[word:kezharazh|kezharazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozharazh|thothozharazh]] || [[word:jojozharazh|jojozharazh]] || [[word:shoshozharazh|shoshozharazh]] || [[word:kokozharazh|kokozharazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozharazh|thozharazh]] || [[word:jozharazh|jozharazh]] || [[word:shozharazh|shozharazh]] || [[word:kozharazh|kozharazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozharazh|thozharazh]] || [[word:jozharazh|jozharazh]] || [[word:shozharazh|shozharazh]] || [[word:kozharazh|kozharazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙zharazh|th忙zharazh]] || [[word:j忙zharazh|j忙zharazh]] || [[word:sh忙zharazh|sh忙zharazh]] || [[word:k忙zharazh|k忙zharazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazharazh|thathazharazh]] || [[word:jajazharazh|jajazharazh]] || [[word:shashazharazh|shashazharazh]] || [[word:kakazharazh|kakazharazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazharazh|thazharazh]] || [[word:jazharazh|jazharazh]] || [[word:shazharazh|shazharazh]] || [[word:kazharazh|kazharazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazharazh|thazharazh]] || [[word:jazharazh|jazharazh]] || [[word:shazharazh|shazharazh]] || [[word:kazharazh|kazharazh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazharazh|shazharazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazharazh|goshazharazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazharazh|gokishazharazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazharazhn眉|shazharazhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazharazhnkn眉|goshazharazhnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazharazhn眉|gokishazharazhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazharazhsh毛|shazharazhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazharazhnksh毛|goshazharazhnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazharazhsh毛|gokishazharazhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazharazhro|shazharazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazharazhnkro|goshazharazhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazharazhro|gokishazharazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazharazhmu|shazharazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazharazhnkmu|goshazharazhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazharazhmu|gokishazharazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazharazhsher|shazharazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazharazhnksher|goshazharazhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazharazhsher|gokishazharazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazharazhng|shazharazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazharazhnkng|goshazharazhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazharazhng|gokishazharazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazharazhya|shazharazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazharazhnkya|goshazharazhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazharazhya|gokishazharazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazharazhyam|shazharazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazharazhnkyam|goshazharazhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazharazhyam|gokishazharazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazharazhn眉sh毛|shazharazhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazharazhnkn眉sh毛|goshazharazhnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazharazhn眉sh毛|gokishazharazhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazharazhn眉ro|shazharazhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazharazhnkn眉ro|goshazharazhnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazharazhn眉ro|gokishazharazhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazharazhn眉mu|shazharazhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazharazhnkn眉mu|goshazharazhnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazharazhn眉mu|gokishazharazhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazharazhsh毛n眉|shazharazhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazharazhnksh毛n眉|goshazharazhnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazharazhsh毛n眉|gokishazharazhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazharazhsh毛ro|shazharazhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazharazhnksh毛ro|goshazharazhnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazharazhsh毛ro|gokishazharazhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazharazhsh毛mu|shazharazhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazharazhnksh毛mu|goshazharazhnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazharazhsh毛mu|gokishazharazhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazharazhron眉|shazharazhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazharazhnkron眉|goshazharazhnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazharazhron眉|gokishazharazhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazharazhrosh毛|shazharazhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazharazhnkrosh毛|goshazharazhnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazharazhrosh毛|gokishazharazhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazharazhromu|shazharazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazharazhnkromu|goshazharazhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazharazhromu|gokishazharazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazharazhmun眉|shazharazhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazharazhnkmun眉|goshazharazhnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazharazhmun眉|gokishazharazhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazharazhmush毛|shazharazhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazharazhnkmush毛|goshazharazhnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazharazhmush毛|gokishazharazhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazharazhmuro|shazharazhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazharazhnkmuro|goshazharazhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazharazhmuro|gokishazharazhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
